prompt: Bold modern logo design on solid black background. A stylized monogram where two M letters are constructed using thick angular strokes inspired by African Adinkra symbols — geometric, powerful, meaningful. The strokes are bold white with sharp angles and clean corners, forming an abstract shield or crown shape that clearly reads as MM. One accent element in electric cyan (#00E3FF) — a small diamond or dot at the center where the two M's connect. Below, 'MM AGENCY.' in thin modern uppercase sans-serif with wide tracking. The design feels powerful, rooted, authoritative — like a modern interpretation of ancestral symbols for a contemporary brand. Clean vector quality, sharp edges, perfectly centered.
